front: What is angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and its inhibitors?
back: ACE is a zinc metalloprotease that cleaves Ang I → Ang II (vasoconstrictor). Also degrades bradykinin. ACE inhibitors (captopril, enalapril, lisinopril) block active site zinc. Drug design: transition state mimics, zinc-binding groups (thiol, carboxylate, phosphonate). Major hypertension drugs.
